Description:


The California Franchise Tax Board (FTB), is seeking to contract with a vendor to renew iCapture and Tangent software and IBML Scanner hardware maintenance and support.

Last Day to Submit Final Bids is June 5, 2026, by 5:00PM Pacific Time.
